displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Hero Of The Confederacy
synopsis: Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Hero of the Confederacy was the third and final story arc of the Star Wars: The Clone Wars monthly comic series. The story was written by Henry Gilroy, head writer for the first season of the animated television series, and Steven Melching, who contributed several scripts to the show. The arc ran for three issues from November 11, 2009 to January 6, 2010.
title: The Clone Wars: Hero Of The Confederacy
